title: Senior BackOffice Support Executive
description:
• Analyzed service status, designing data collection, storage, and processing from various sources (raw data) for service monitoring.
• Optimized the consolidation, calculation, and presentation of KPIs using pivot tables and charts to improve data-driven decision making.
• Guaranteed operational continuity through proactive system monitoring, resolving high-impact incidents to maintain customer service availability.
• Contributed to process improvement by interpreting operational indicator results, reducing infrastructure failure recurrence.
